cuts.name: i_didnt_know_i_could_do_this
cuts.label: Cut 1 — I didn't know I could do this
cuts.hook: Close-up of hands pouring, uncertain and focused — builds to the beautiful finished result
cuts.vibe: Soft, personal, aspirational — the surprise of discovering you can do this

cuts.name: hamburgs_most_underrated_evening
cuts.label: Cut 2 — Hamburg's most underrated evening
cuts.hook: Stunning green-lit circular venue interior — immediate FOMO — then moody bar, action, blowtorch
cuts.vibe: High energy FOMO — this venue is unreal and you're missing it

cuts.name: what_they_dont_tell_you
cuts.label: Cut 3 — What they don't tell you
cuts.hook: Guests watching the instructor — immediately relatable 'student' energy
cuts.vibe: Conversational, curious, self-deprecating — list format with a delicious payoff
